steps.title: Identify what the painting lacks
steps.content: The poem emphasizes what is missing from the barren landscape: no hope, no green growth, and no sheltering roof. The word sheltering must name the protection such a roof would provide.

steps.title: Match the protective meaning
steps.content: The word sheltering means protective—a roof that shields from the elements. The other choices describe unrelated concepts: restrictive implies confining, affectionate suggests emotional warmth, and suspicious relates to distrust. That matches choice A — A is correct.
